manifest.author: shoedler
manifest.description: Find possible backlinks in your notes.
manifest.name: Crossbow

releases.author: shoedler
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fixes contrast issue by @usernotnull in https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/29
* Fixes Bug #22 . It's now possible to have multiple char-by-char identical suggestions, e.g. a file named "REST" and headings named "REST" don't overwrite each other.
* Some progress on Bug #28. Still not working properly
* Some UI refinements in the side-panel (tree view), including "pills", and some typography improvements
![image](https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/assets/38029550/20b9b122-1c58-46ad-9297-bdf5e42798d8)

Some technical detail on the work done for the side-pane (Tree view):
* Model objects now implement a new `TreeNode` interface, so they can be easily mapped to tree nodes in the DOM.
* Implemented batch-updating the DOM via `requestAnimationFrame`
* Improved retrieval of `targetEditor` - fixes updating via manual refresh button (Couldn't have worked - ever)

## New Contributors
* @usernotnull made their first contribution in https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/29

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/compare/1.3.0...1.4.0

releases.author: shoedler
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Drastically improves suggestion generation performance. See https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/issues/17#issuecomment-1556031039
* Adds a setting to ignore vault folders from being indexed. See #20 
* Adds a subtitle to suggestions showing the name of the source file. See #21
* Fixes a Bug where suggestions were displayed from files which were renamed/deleted. See #16. New "issues" are documented in #22 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/compare/1.2.1...1.3.0

releases.author: shoedler
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Update issue templates https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/8
* Add auto refresh settings https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/11
* Update README.md, closes #7 in https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/13
* Adds go to source feature https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/14
* Improves tokenization (performance overall) https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/pull/15

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/compare/1.2.0...1.2.1

releases.author: shoedler
releases.description:
- Drastically improves performance by lazy loading suggestions
- Adds a feature so that crossbow will not run in the background if you close the crossbow view (See README)
- Minor bug fixes

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/shoedler/crossbow/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: shoedler
releases.description:
- Adds a "Under the hood" section in the README
- Adds a new setting which allows the user to ignore cache items which start with a lowercase letter (defaults to `false`)
- Fixes `onMetadataChanged` event listener always triggering on event, without respecting the cooldown. This will reduce CPU load, crossbow will only update the suggestions after you finished typing.
